name: Feature DoR — SF Origination Extensions (Starter Draft)

criteria.name: Fair Lending Review Scoped
criteria.description: Whether the feature changes underwriting logic, pricing, or credit-decisioning is identified, and Fair Lending review is scheduled if so.
criteria.why: Fair lending exposure ships silently when underwriting changes don't trigger review.
criteria.fix: Confirm Fair Lending review is required (yes/no). If yes, schedule before the feature ships.
criteria.good_example: Fair Lending review: required. Scheduled for 2026-05-12 with [Fair Lending lead].
